title: geonoma pohliana subsp. weddelliana
intro: Geonoma pohliana subsp. weddelliana, also known as the Weddell's geonoma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geonoma pohliana subsp. weddelliana include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and pain relief, as well as its potential use in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used in traditional medicine practices in South America.
